query:
SELECT g.id, g.game_date, g.sport, g.status,
       g.away_team_id, g.home_team_id,
       at.name AS awayName, at.abbreviation AS awayAbbr, at.vsin_slug AS awayVsin,
       ht.name AS homeName, ht.abbreviation AS homeAbbr, ht.vsin_slug AS homeVsin,
       g.model_away_spread, g.model_home_spread, g.model_total,
       g.model_away_ml, g.model_home_ml
FROM games g
JOIN nba_teams at ON g.away_team_id = at.id
JOIN nba_teams ht ON g.home_team_id = ht.id
WHERE g.game_date = '2026-03-08' AND g.sport = 'NBA'
ORDER BY g.start_time ASC;
